# Drone News 48h Brief — February 23, 2026

_Window: last 48 hours; 24 incidents._

## Summary
In the past 48 hours, various drone incidents have been reported across different regions, highlighting ongoing concerns regarding security and safety. In Krasnodar, a drone attack resulted in damage to a residential building, raising alarms about drone terrorism. Meanwhile, Lebanon and Jordan intercepted drone smuggling attempts involving drugs. India has unveiled its first anti-terrorism policy emphasizing drone threats, particularly in cross-border contexts. In Vietnam, unauthorized drones disrupted over 50 flights at Da Nang International Airport, indicating a significant operational interference. These incidents underscore a trend of increasing drone misuse, pushing discussions around policy and safety practices.

**By category:** airport: 5 • arrest: 2 • interference: 3 • other: 8 • smuggling: 3 • terrorism: 3
**Top queries:** drone airport disruption (7), drone incident (7), drone terrorism (5), drone smuggling (3), drone prison (1)

## Clusters
**airport disruptions** — Repeated incidents of drones disrupting air travel indicate a growing pattern impacting aviation security.

## Highlights
- **[A residential building in Krasnodar was damaged by a drone attack.](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTE91ZGRCdmVTaXFiLTd0Mk40SVk3ZXdMel9LWUpMazA1VjF3bHRpVkpxWXlPRG80WTFUeFhiTU5NaWdJN3NNTGZqNV9rTVR4WHNyaUdqMWlkek0?oc=5)** — The incident involved significant damage to property. _(score 0.80; tags: terrorism)_
- **[India unveils first-ever anti-terror policy addressing drone threats.](https://news.google.?oc=5)** — This policy aims to counter cross-border and cyber threats. _(score 0.70; tags: terrorism)_
- **[Jordan foils drone drug smuggling attempt.](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiSEFVX3lxTE5sd1MwdElHSEJERUp2QWN1S2hScGNCWG1ZMHNDc2RCX3QxbHpzSlVzUTNCVW9UTlFBMjg2THR3UktsWmlVTXNsTw?oc=5)** — The operation highlighted ongoing challenges with drone smuggling. _(score 0.60; tags: smuggling)_
- **[India rolls out first anti-terror doctrine focused on drone threats.](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)** — The doctrine aims to fortify national defense against drone terrorism. _(score 0.70; tags: terrorism)_
